questionHtml: Deduce the half-equations for the reaction at each electrode when current flows.
markschemeHtml:
Positive electrode (cathode):

Ag+(aq) + e– → Ag(s)

 

Negative electrode (anode):

Mg(s) → Mg2+(aq) + 2e–

 

Award [1 max] if correct equations given at wrong electrodes.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Deduce the half-equations for the reaction at each electrode when current flows.
